message:
fix: Numerical stability and edge case handling improvements

Collection of defensive fixes for edge cases that could cause incorrect
behavior or subtle bugs.

**Alpha blending stability (src/color.rs):**
- Add `ALPHA_EPSILON` (1e-6) threshold check in `blend_over()`
- Prevents division by near-zero alpha values which could amplify
  floating-point errors and produce unstable color results
- Returns TRANSPARENT for effectively-transparent results

**Terminal size validation (src/terminal/raw.rs):**
- Add check for zero dimensions from `terminal_size()`
- Returns error "terminal reported zero dimensions" instead of 0x0
- Prevents downstream division-by-zero in buffer allocation code
- Added doc comment explaining the validation

**Grapheme width saturation (src/unicode/grapheme.rs):**
- Saturate width and byte_len to u8::MAX instead of truncating
- Added doc comment explaining why u8 is safe (graphemes rarely exceed
  255 bytes, display widths are typically 0-2)
- Prevents silent data corruption from `as u8` truncation

**Text cursor position fix (src/text/view.rs):**
- Fix edge case where byte_offset < vline.byte_start
- Return (row, 0) instead of continuing, placing cursor at line start
- Prevents cursor from being incorrectly positioned when scrolling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
